text: In 2026, the CEO office is evolving into an 'agentic command center'. Socure is building its first agent-led CEO office and hiring a Chief of Staff.
Wild stats: 1 in 343 job applicants is linked to a North Korean IT worker scheme. By 2028, 1 in 4 candidates in tech hiring pipelines will be fabricated.
We're grateful to be back on the Forbes Fintech 50 list. ARR exited the year growing 50% and crossing $300M.
Most checkout fraud solutions force a tradeoff: stronger security or higher conversion. Bolt is partnering with Socure to remove that tradeoff.
